snippet.title: Ghis Ghis Ghis | Welcome to the Jungle | Akshay Kumar, Akshara Singh | Vikram Montrose | 26th June
snippet.description:
Presenting the ultimate collaboration of the year, Bollywood Khiladi Akshay Kumar teams up with the undisputed queen of Bhojpuri cinema, Akshara Singh. ЁЯФеЁЯО╢ Ghis Ghis Ghis from 'Welcome to the Jungle' sung by Vikram Montrose and Supriya Pathak, with catchy lyrics by Abhinav Shekhar, is not just a song; itтАЩs a high-octane Bollywood-Bhojpuri celebration packed with desi swag, electrifying energy, and nonstop entertainment.

#GhisGhisGhis #AkshayKumar #AksharaSingh #WelcomeToTheJungle #BollywoodSong #BollywoodDanceSong #BhojpuriSong #BhojpuriDanceSong #PartySong #DanceSong #BollywoodNewSong

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Suniel Shetty, Disha Patani, Jacqueline Fernandez, Arshad Warsi, Jackie Shroff, Paresh Rawal, Raveena Tandon, Lara Dutta, Farida Jalal, Johny Lever, Shreyas Talpade, Tusshar Kapoor, Rajpal Yadav, Krushna Abhishek, Kiku Sharda, Daler Mehndi, Aftab Shivdasani, Mukesh Tiwari, Yashpal Sharma, Kiran Kumar, Zakir Hussain, Vindu Dara Singh, Urvashi Rautela, Hemant Pandey, Brijendra Kala, Feroze Khan(Arjun), Late Pankaj Dheer ji, Puneet Issar, Sudesh Berry, Jeetu Verma, Vrihi Kodvara, Adityaa Singgh, Bhagya Bhanushali 

A.A. Nadiadwala, Cape of Good Films & Star Studio18 present 
In association with Seeta Films & Rakesh Dang 
A Base Industries Group Production 
Produced by Firoz  A.  Nadiadwallah, Rakesh Dang & Vedant Vikaas Baali
Director: Ahmed Khan
DOP: Kabir Lal 
Story: Late Neeraj Vora Ji 
Dialogue: Farhad Samji 
Editor: Nitin FCP

snippet.title: HAMDAM (Official Music Video) - Hesham Abdul Wahab, Hanan Shaah, Shafi Kollam, HarisSaleem, Zakariya
snippet.description:
тАЬBetween prayers and memories, there lives a HamdamтАЭ.

Celebrate this Bakrid with "HAMDAM," a grand audio-visual anthem from Aachus Production that beautifully bridges traditional festive warmth with modern global sounds to deliver a powerful message of peace, love, and togetherness.

Composed and performed by Hesham Abdul Wahab, the track features the soulful vocals of Hanan Shaah, moving Malayalam lyrics by Shafi Kollam, and an energetic English rap verse by veteran artist Haris Saleem (Street Academics). Bringing this melody to life on screen is award-winning filmmaker Zakariya in his music video directorial debut, transforming "HAMDAM" into a stunning, cinematic celebration of community.

Listen to HAMDAM: https://tuneabl.com/stream-hamdam

Music Credits:
Song Composed, Arranged and produced by Hesham Abdul wahab 
Singers: Hesham Abdul Wahab, Hanan Shaah, Shafi Kollam
Rap performed and written by Haris Saleem (Street Academics)

localized.title: HAMDAM (Official Music Video) - Hesham Abdul Wahab, Hanan Shaah, Shafi Kollam, HarisSaleem, Zakariya
localized.description:
тАЬBetween prayers and memories, there lives a HamdamтАЭ.

Celebrate this Bakrid with "HAMDAM," a grand audio-visual anthem from Aachus Production that beautifully bridges traditional festive warmth with modern global sounds to deliver a powerful message of peace, love, and togetherness.

Composed and performed by Hesham Abdul Wahab, the track features the soulful vocals of Hanan Shaah, moving Malayalam lyrics by Shafi Kollam, and an energetic English rap verse by veteran artist Haris Saleem (Street Academics). Bringing this melody to life on screen is award-winning filmmaker Zakariya in his music video directorial debut, transforming "HAMDAM" into a stunning, cinematic celebration of community.

Listen to HAMDAM: https://tuneabl.com/stream-hamdam

Song Composed, Arranged and produced by Hesham Abdul wahab

snippet.title: Mango Pachcha - Official Trailer | Sanchith | Viveka | KRG Studios | Supriyanvi
snippet.description:
For more latest songs & videos, subscribe ЁЯСЙ https://bit.ly/Saregama_Kannada

From the streets of Mysore to the shadows behind power,
a story filled with emotions, chaos, family, politics & rebellion is ready to unfoldЁЯФе

Supriyanvi Picture Studios and KRG Studios proudly present the official trailer of Mango Pachcha
Introducing Sanchit Sanjeev тАФ a fresh talent stepping into cinema with fire, intensity and honesty filled with emotion, rage, innocence and madness тАФ making a striking debut on the big screen.

тАЬPeople with power win wars.
People with willpower build empires.тАЭ

Mysuru 2001-02: Mango Pachcha chronicles the saga of loyalty, deceit and power spanning over a decade on a local empire.

Movie Credits:
Producers: Priya Sudeep, Karthik & Yogi G Raj
Director: Viveka
Written by: Viveka, Nagbhushan Deshpande
Cast: Sanchith Sanjeev, Kajal Kunder, Prashanth Hiremath, Mayur Patel, Jai , Harini Shreekanth, Hamsa Narayanaswamy, Ugramm Manju

Subitles-Samarth Madhusudan Rao

"Perfect Partner" is an Upcoming Telugu Romcom Web Series Featuring Sushma Gopal & Rishi Narayan as leads.

Cast: Sushma Gopal, Rishi Narayan, Chandu SMS, Sravanthi, Devi

Producer: Vandana Banduru

Presented by Infinitum Network Solutions.

snippet.title: @SaiAbhyankkar - Karuppu (Jukebox) | Suriya | Trisha | RJ Balaji | Dream Warrior Pictures
snippet.description:
Presenting the Jukebox of "Karuppu", Music Composed, Arranged and Programmed by @SaiAbhyankkar 

Intro - 0:00

Song Credits:

Song Name : God Mode - 0:22
Lyrics : Vishnu Edavan
Singers : Sai Abhyankkar, Gana Muthu
Backing Vocals : The Indian Choral Ensemble
Synth, Keys, Bass, Rhythm by Sai Abhyankkar
Additional Percussions by Kalyan
Additional Rhythm by Yanka
Nasik Dhol : Salem Kuzhu
Electric Guitar : Robin Sebastian
Trumpets : Rakesh MS
Sound Engineers : Rajesh kannan, Abin Ponnachan
Mixed by Sai Abhyankkar
Mastered by Akash Shravan

Song Name : Verappa - Extended - 4:22
Singers : Sai Abhyankkar, Arivu
Lyrics : Arun Srinivasan
Additional Vocals : Mahesh Vinayakram, Arun Kaundinya, Yogi Sekar
Rap : Theo 
Synth, Keys and Synth Bass : Sai Abhyankkar  
Additional Rhythm : Kalyan
Kumbaaara Rhythm : Yanka Percussion Group
Guitars : Godfray Immanuel 
Moorsing : Mahesh Vinayakram
Navtar : Vishnu 

The Indian Choral Ensemble: Vanathi Suresh, Sivaranjini Chandramouli, Shri Badhra K A Yazhini, Bavathayini Nagarajan, Varsha R Mallya

Mixed by Sai Abhyankkar at Yolo Rechords
Mastered by Rupendar Venkatesh

Song Name - Naanga Naalu Peru - 8:43
Singers : Silambarasan TR,  Sai Abhyankkar , Asal Kolaar  
Lyrics - Asal Kolaar, Arun Srinivasan  
Composed, Arranged & Programmed by Sai Abhyankkar
Synth, Keys, Bass, Rhythm by Sai Abhyankkar
Trumpets : Rakesh  
Shennai : Pandit Dr S Ballesh Bhajantri  
Mixed by Sai Abhyankkar at Yolo Rechords  
Mastered by Rupendar Venkatesh at Yolo Rechords  
Studio Operation : Rajesh kannan 

Song Name : Raathu Raasan - 11:57
Singers : Sai Abhyankkar, VM Mahalingam, Paal Dabba
Lyrics : Vivek
Synth, Keys, Bass, Rhythm by Sai Abhyankkar
Additional Rhythm by Yanka
Additional Percussions Iniyan
Mixed by Sai Abhyankkar at Yolo Rechords
Vocals Mixed by Akash Shravan
Mastered by - Rupendar Venkatesh at Sai Dhwani Studios
All Recorded and Produced at Yolo Rechords, Chennai

Song Name : Karuppa Kooda Va - 15:11
Singers : Sai Abhyankkar, V.M. Mahalingam
Karuppan Chants : Srinidhi
Additional Vocal Harmonies : Jishnu Vijayan
Lyrics : Pa. Vijay
Synth, Keys, Rhythm by Sai Abhyankkar
Additional Rhythm by Yanka Percussion Group
Katakaa Ethnic Reed : Kaviayyan
Jaw Harp : Bunty (Thrissur)
Mixed by Sai Abhyankkar  at Yolo Rechords
Mastered by Akash Shravan
Sound Engineer : Rajesh Kannan
Creative Consultant : Adesh Krishna

Song Name: Athu Thalore - 19:18
Singer : Ananya Chakraborty
Lyrics : Adesh Krishna
Choir : The Indian Choral Ensemble
Conducted by Kalyani Nair, Karthik Manickavasakam
Recorded at Studio UNO records, Kuzhali Records
Recorded by Sivasathya R, Karthik Manickavasakam
Additional Rhythm by Yanka Percussion Group
Mixed by  Sai Abhyankkar at Yolo Rechords 
Mastered by Roshan Sebastian

Song Name : Aathi Raasathi - 23:10
Singer : Dhass Benjamin
Lyrics : Pa. Vijay

Song Name : God Mode Begins - 27:04
Lyrics : Vishnu Edavan
Singers : Sai Abhyankkar, Gana Muthu

Song Name : Verappa - 28:00
Singers : Sai Abhyankkar, Arivu
Lyrics : Arun Srinivasan
Additional Vocals : Mahesh Vinayakram, Arun Kaundinya, Yogi Sekar
Rap : Theo 
Synth, Keys and Synth Bass : Sai Abhyankkar  
Additional Rhythm : Kalyan
Kumbaaara Rhythm : Yanka Percussion Group
Guitars : Godfray Immanuel 
Moorsing : Mahesh Vinayakram
Navtar : Vishnu 

The Indian Choral Ensemble : Vanathi Suresh, Sivaranjini Chandramouli, Shri Badhra K A, Yazhini, Bavathayini Nagarajan, Varsha R Mallya

Mixed by Sai Abhyankkar at Yolo Rechords
Mastered by Rupendar Venkatesh

For All Songs:

Recorded and Produced at Yolo Rechords, Chennai

Creative Consultant : Adesh Krishna

Jukebox Animated by Manibharathi Selvaraj

Movie Credits :

Cast : Suriya, Trisha, Indrans, Natty, Mansoor Ali Khan, Swasika, Sshivadha, Anagha Maya Ravi, Supreeth Reddy and Others
Written & Directed by RJ Balaji
Produced by Dream Warrior Pictures
Producers : S R Prakash Babu & S R Prabu
Executive Producer : Aravendraj Baskaran
Writers : Ashwin Ravichandran - Rahul Raj - T S Gopi Krishnan - Karan Aravind Kumar
Director of Photography : G K Vishnu
Music : Sai Abhyankkar
Production Designer : Arun Venjaramoodu
Editor : R Kalaivanan
Stunts : Vikram Mor
Production Controller : Rajendran PS
Choreography : Shobi - Sandy - Anusha Viswanathan
Lyrics : Pa Vijay - Vivek - Vishnu Edavan - Asal Kolaar - Adesh Krishna - Arun Srinivasan
Stylist : Praveen Raja - Eka Lakhani - Divya Nagarajan
Costumes : Perumal Selvam
Make-up : Vinoth Sukumaran
Color by Redchillies.color
Sr.Colortist : Ken Metzker
VFX Supervisor : Logaraj.C
VFX Studios: Little Hippo Studios, Spectre post, Halohues Studios, EFX magic, Realworks Studios, Sozo VFX, Focus VFX, Bhishma Studios, Pix rocks VFX, ADFX Studio (Title Animation)
SFX : Arun S Mani (Oli Sound Labs)
Sound Mix : Vinay Sridhar
Stills : D.Narendran
Publicity Designs: Kabilan
Associate EP : Allaudin Hussain, ALS Sathappa Srinivasan
PRO : Sathish S2

Audio Label : Think Music

snippet.title: Zaroori Tha (Music Video) Rahat Fateh Ali Khan | Gauahar Khan and Kushal Tandon | Back 2 Love
snippet.description:
Aaj hum lekar aaye hain ustad Rahat Fateh Ali Khan ka one of the most iconic and heartbreaking tracks "Zaroori Tha". Agar aapne kabhi sachha pyaar kiya hai aur us dard ko mehsoos kiya hai, toh yeh gaana seedha aapke dil ko chhoo jayega. ЁЯе║ЁЯТФ

Featuring the amazing Gauahar Khan and Kushal Tandon, yeh video ek aisi adhuri love story bayaan karta hai jo aapko emotional kar degi. Rahat Sahab ki magical voice aur deep lyrics ka yeh combo sahi mein next level hai!

Aapko is gaane ka kaunsa part sabse best laga? Hamein Comments mein zaroor batayein! ЁЯСЗ

Credits:
Performed by Rahat Fateh Ali Khan
Written by Khalil ur Rehman, Sahir Ali Bagga
Produced by Rahat Fateh Ali KhanSalman Ahmed

(C) 2014 Universal Music India Pvt. Ltd.

en-US.title: Zaroori Tha (Music Video) Rahat Fateh Ali Khan | Gauahar Khan and Kushal Tandon | Back 2 Love
en-US.description:
Today, we bring you one of the most iconic and heartbreaking tracks from maestro Rahat Fateh Ali Khan, "Zaroori Tha." If you've ever experienced true love and felt the pain, this song will touch your heart. ЁЯе║ЁЯТФ

Featuring the amazing Gauahar Khan and Kushal Tandon, this video narrates an incomplete love story that will leave you emotional. The combination of Rahat Sahab's magical voice and deep lyrics is truly next-level!

Which part of this song did you like best? Let us know in the comments! ЁЯСЗ

snippet.title: Dil Laga Liya Maine Tumse Pyaar Karke - Dil Hai Tumhaara | Alka Yagnik, Udit Narayan | Hindi Song
snippet.description:
Song Credits :
Singer(s) : Alka Yagnik & Udit Narayan
Music Director: Nadeem Shravan
Lyricist: Sameer

Movie Cast & Crew :
Producer : Tips Films
Director : Kundan Shah
Cast : Preity Zinta, Arjun Rampal, Jimmy Shergill, Mahima Chaudhry & Rekha 

Song Lyrics:

Hey Hey Hey Hey Hey
Aa Aa Aa Aa Aa 
Hey Hey Hey Hey Hey
Aa Aa Aa Aa Aa

Dil Laga Liya
Maine Tumse Pyaar Karke 
Tumse Pyaar Karke
Tumse Pyaar Karke
Dil Laga Liya
Maine Tumse Pyaar Karke 
Tumse Pyaar Karke
Tumse Pyaar Karke

Dil Chura Liya
Maine Ikraar Karke 
Ikraar Karke, Ikraar Karke 
Dil Laga Liya
Maine Tumse Pyaar Karke 
Tumse Pyaar Karke
Tumse Pyaar Karke 

Mere Diljaani Mere
Maahi Mere Dholna 
Koi Sun Lega Zara
Dheere Dheere Bolna 
Haan, Ishq Kiya Hai Maine
Chori Nahin Ki Hai 
Tere Sang Yaara
Jora Jori Nahin Ki Hai 

Chain Le Liya
Maine Beqaraar Karke 
Beqaraar Karke, Beqaraar Karke 
Dil Laga Liya
Maine Tumse Pyaar Karke 
Tumse Pyaar Karke
Tumse Pyaar Karke

Beech Safar Mein Kahin
Mera Saath Chhodke 
Tujhko Kasam Hai
Naiyyo Jaana Dil Todke 
Kaise Main Bataaoon Tujhe
Kaisa Mera Haal Ve 
Jeena Marna Hai Sab
Ab Tere Naal Ve 

Tujhko Paa Liya
Tera Intezaar Karke 
Intezaar Karke, Intezaar Karke
Dil Laga Liya
Maine Tumse Pyaar Karke 
Tumse Pyaar Karke, Tumse Pyaar Karke

#DilLagaLiya #DilHaiTumhaara #PreityZinta #ArjunRampal #AlkaYagnik #UditNarayan

рдХрд╡рд┐рддреНрддрд╛ рдХреГрд╖реНрдгрдореВрд░реНрддрд┐ рдХреА рдордзреБрд░ рдЖрд╡рд╛рдЬ, рд╣рдореЗрдВ 2000 рдХреЗ рджрд╢рдХ рдХреА рдЦреБрд╢рд╣рд╛рд▓ рдпрд╛рджреЛрдВ рдореЗрдВ рд▓реЗ рдЬрд╛рддреА рд╣реИред рдЙрдирдХреА рдЧрд╛рдпрдХреА рдореЗрдВ рдПрдХ рдРрд╕рд╛ рдЬрд╛рджреВ рд╣реИ, рдЬреЛ рд╣рд░ рджрд┐рд▓ рдХреЛ рдЫреВ рдЬрд╛рддрд╛ рд╣реИред рдлрд┐рд▓реНрдо 'рдЕрдВрд╢' рдХрд╛ рдЧрд╛рдирд╛ 'рд╕рд┐рд░реНрдл рд╕рдВрдбреЗ рдХреЛ' рдПрдХ рдРрд╕рд╛ рд╣реА рдЧреАрдд рд╣реИ, рдЬреЛ рдЖрдЬ рднреА рд╣рдорд╛рд░реА рдкреНрд▓реЗрд▓рд┐рд╕реНрдЯ рдореЗрдВ рд╢рд╛рдорд┐рд▓ рд╣реИред рдпрд╣ рдЧрд╛рдирд╛ рдкреНрдпрд╛рд░ рдФрд░ рдЦреБрд╢реА рдХрд╛ рдПрдХ рдЦреВрдмрд╕реВрд░рдд рдПрд╣рд╕рд╛рд╕ рдХрд░рд╛рддрд╛ рд╣реИред

рдпрд╣ рдЧрд╛рдирд╛ рд╣рдореЗрдВ рдЙрд╕ рджреМрд░ рдХреА рдпрд╛рдж рджрд┐рд▓рд╛рддрд╛ рд╣реИ рдЬрдм рд╕рдВрдЧреАрдд рдореЗрдВ рд╕рд╛рджрдЧреА рдФрд░ рдордзреБрд░рддрд╛ рд╣реЛрддреА рдереАред рдХрд╡рд┐рддреНрддрд╛ рдЬреА рдХреА рдЖрд╡рд╛рдЬ рдореЗрдВ рдПрдХ рдЕрд▓рдЧ рд╣реА рддрд░рд╣ рдХрд╛ рдЖрдХрд░реНрд╖рдг рд╣реИ, рдЬреЛ рд╣рдореЗрдВ рдЗрд╕ рдЧрд╛рдиреЗ рдХреЛ рдмрд╛рд░-рдмрд╛рд░ рд╕реБрдирдиреЗ рдХреЗ рд▓рд┐рдП рдордЬрдмреВрд░ рдХрд░рддрд╛ рд╣реИред 'рд╕рд┐рд░реНрдл рд╕рдВрдбреЗ рдХреЛ' рдЧрд╛рдирд╛ рдПрдХ рдРрд╕рд╛ рдЧреАрдд рд╣реИ, рдЬреЛ рд╣рд░ рдЙрдореНрд░ рдХреЗ рд▓реЛрдЧреЛрдВ рдХреЛ рдкрд╕рдВрдж рдЖрддрд╛ рд╣реИред

 

Credits :

Song: Sirf Sunday Ko
Album: Ansh
Artist: Kavita Krishnamurthy
Music Director: Nadeem-Shravan
Lyricist: Sameer 
 


Lyrics :

chori chori wo mere pas aaya khidki ke niche se mujhko bulaya
kahne laga chal mere sath rani maine koi bat uski na mani
fir usne pucha hafte ka kya programme hai
milke bitayenge kabhi ek sham to maine kaha
karti hu mai to pyar sirf sunday ko
are karti hu mai to pyar sirf sunday ko
tum karna mera intzar sirf sunday ko
monday ko mujhe bada kam hai ek pal bhi na aaram hai
mangal budh ko mai kya kahu mushkil badi gulfam hai
jumme rat jumma fir bazar jau shaniwar ko ghar mai der se aau
der se aau baba der se aau kyonki karti hu mai ikrar
sirf sunday ko tum karna mera intzar sirf sunday ko

aise yaha roz milne me to mujhko maja nahi aaye
ho jaye na badnami kahi mera to ji gharbaye
aise yaha roz milne me to mujhko maja nahi aaye
ho jaye na badnami kahi mera to ji gharbaye
mana ke tu bekhyal hai tera diwano sa hal hai
teri mere yar darmaya rahne de kuch dil ki duriya
ye bekasi meri jan le kyuki karti hu mai didar
sirf sunday ko tum karna mera intzar sirf sunday ko

logo ki aankho se sola baras maine sambhali jawani
kar dungi uske hawale jo hoga mera diljani
logo ki aankho se sola baras maine sambhali jawani
kar dungi uske hawale jo hoga mera diljani
layega doli barat wo le jayega mujhko sath wo
manungi na mai teri bat mai hatho me dungi na hath mai
ja re ja kaha mera man le kyonki karti hu aankhe char
sirf sunday ko tum karna mera intzar sirf sunday ko

monday ko mujhe bada kam hai ek pal bhi na aaram hai
mangal budh ko mai kya kahu mushkil badi gulfam hai
jumme rat jumma fir bazar jau shaniwar ko ghar mai der se aau
der se aau baba der se aau kyonki karti hu mai ikrar
sirf sunday ko tum karna mera intzar sirf sunday ko

Song Lyrics:
Kondsa thara kaam chale, jo saath me poora gaam chale

Shehar ke bacche fan thare, jab muh pe Ram ka naam chale
Aa jahaj chale aur byaaj chale, mhare gaama ka riwaaj chale

Are poora circle yaaron ka, jisme bhai-bhai hoti hai

Aa Panchkula aur Mahendragarh tak, kaam nahi se rukan ka

Dum rakhe se chhora tere, upar khokha fookan ka
Saaj chale, awaaz chale, kaala diggal ka raaj chale

Deep Laath tere gaane te, teri basai ne hota naaz chale
Aa jahaj chale aur byaaj chale, mhare gaama ka riwaaj chale

Saari bande gel bawli, 80 lakh ke jahaj chale

snippet.description:
тЬи Presenting Badi Mastani Hai Meri Mehbooba in our own JalRaj style. ЁЯО╢ЁЯТЦ
Since you all know how much we love 90s songs, and we have recreated many of them to add in our playlist. Aane Se Uske Aaye Bahar is one such 90s song which we couldn't leave out. A beautiful melody reimagined to celebrate love in every form...dedicate it to your special someone, be it your partner, parents, friends, or even your pets. ЁЯе░ 

Dive into the magic of love! ЁЯМЯ

ЁЯСЙ If you loved this cover, donтАЩt forget to LIKE, SHARE, and SUBSCRIBE to our channel for more beautiful renditions!

If you liked the song,
You can Support our music with the Virtual Tip JarЁЯЩП :

Credits :
Vocals - JalRaj (Jalaj)
Music Production - JalRaj 
Mix & Master - JalRaj
Video  - JalRaj

ЁЯОд Original Song Credits:
ЁЯОзSong: Aane Se Uske Aaye Bahar
ЁЯОм Film: Jeene Ki Raah (1969)
ЁЯО╢ Singer: Mohammed Rafi
тЬНя╕П Lyrics: Anand Bakshi
ЁЯО╝ Music: Laxmikant Pyarelal

**We are two brothers, Jalaj and Rajat, based in Chandigarh. We love making songs in our own way and don't want to categorize them in a particular genre.
The basic idea is to entertain people through our songs.
Hope you enjoy listening to our music as much as we do while making it.**

Follow us on instagram : https://www.instagram.com/jalraj_official

Saamne main sabke 
naam uska nahi le sakunga
Wo sharam ke maare 
rooth jaaye toh main kya karunga

Hooron ki malika hai
Pariyon ki rani hai
Meri mehbooba
Meri zindagani hai
Meri mehbooba

Aane se uske aaye bahaar
Jaane se uske jaaye bahaar
Badi mastani hai meri mehbooba
Meri zindagani hai 
meri mehbooba

Is ghata ko main toh 
uski aankhon ka kaajal kahunga
Is hawa ko main toh 
uska lehraata aanchal kahunga

Kaliyon ka bachpan hai
Phoolon ki jawani hai
Meri mehbooba

Badi mastani hai meri mehbooba

snippet.title: Banjaare тАУ Bairan (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
тЩл Banjaare тАУ Bairan (Lyrics)
тнР Download/Stream: 

ЁЯОд Lyrics: Banjaare тАУ Bairan (Lyrics)

* Verse 1 *
Ho, manne sambh-sambh 
rakhe tere jhanjhara ke jode
Meri gel ro-ro ye bhi 
chhori bawle se hore
Manne aaye jaave khyaal tere
khaye jaave khyaal tere
Jeen koni deti, haaye
bairi tanhaayi manne

* Chorus *
Geetaan mein gaayi
kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re
teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut
chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri 
yaad khadi paayi manne

* Verse 2 *
Ho, maarya-maarya phire
dekh haal tu bichare ka
Tere bina jeena bhi
ke jeena banjaar╨╡ ka?
Khoya rahun yaad teri
kar ke nadaaniyaan
Batue m╨╡in rakhun teri
sambh ke nishaaniyaan
Tere bina kaal horeya
theek konya haal mera
Haath jodun Ram, dede
saanson te rihaayi manne

* Chorus *
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade
chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri
yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut
chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri
yaad khadi paayi manne

* Bridge *
Haan-aan
Aan-aan
Haan-aan

* Verse 3 *
Je tu thodi ghabraajya
meri yaad tanne aa jya
Tu de diye awaaz re
main aa jaaunga
Todun duniya ki reet
re, ke haar re, ke jeet?
Manne chahiye teri
preet, main nibha jaaunga
Dekh, bawla banaagi
manne likhna sikhaagi
Haaye, noch-noch khaagi
teri bairan judaai manne

* Chorus *
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade
chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri
yaad khadi paayi manne
Aaj tai nibhaun jo si
kasam thi khaayi manne
Zindagi saari ya meri
tere lekhe laayi manne

chhaati ke lagaayi manne

yaad khadi paayi manne

Enjoy the peppy and celebrated тАЬThillana ThillanaтАЭ newly restored in 4K 60FPS featuring vibrant visuals, rhythmic dance elements and enhanced studio-level audio mastering from the cult Tamil hit Muthu.

The film stars Superstar Rajinikanth along with an ensemble cast including Meena, Sarath Babu, Radha Ravi, Senthil, Vadivelu, Jayabharathi, Subhashri, Ponnambalam, Vichithra, Raghuvaran, Tiger Prabhakar & Others. Directed by K.S. Ravikumar, the film features music composed by A.R. Rahman with lyrics by Vairamuthu.

Enjoy the peppy and celebrated тАЬThillana ThillanaтАЭ newly restored in 4K 60FPS featuring vibrant visuals, rhythmic dance elements and enhanced studio-level audio mastering from the cult Tamil hit Muthu.

The film stars Superstar Rajinikanth along with an ensemble cast including Meena, Sarath Babu, Radha Ravi, Senthil, Vadivelu, Jayabharathi, Subhashri, Ponnambalam, Vichithra, Raghuvaran, Tiger Prabhakar & Others. Directed by K.S. Ravikumar, the film features music composed by A.R. Rahman with lyrics by Vairamuthu.

snippet.title: Ban Ja Tu Official Music Video |  Charan Preet x Badshah | Ahsii | One for your playlist #partymusic
snippet.description:
тАЬBan Ja TuтАЭ by Charan & Badshah ft. Ahsii is here to set new trends. A track made for your playlists, late-night drives & party vibes. Watch now and share it with your crew ЁЯФе

#badshah #newmusic #banjatu #partymusic 

Lyrics:
Chann Nu Bulake Naale
Darr Tere Aava Mai Tan
Rabb To Faraar Firdaaa
Mai Taan Jag Toh Luka Ke Tenu
Rakhna Laga Ke Seene
Dil Ae Gavah Puchda

Ban Jaa Tu Meri Ban Ja Ban,
Ban Ja Tu Meri Ban Ja Ban,
Reh Jaana Meri Tu Reh Jaa Ban,
Oh Tere Piche Jo Khudayi Chadhh Aaya Mere Maahi kyu?

TuuтАж. Mahi TuтАж Chadd Ke Naaa
Tuu.... JaayiiiтАж Tuuu..
Mahi Tu.. Mahi Tuu. Mahi Tuuu. Mahi Tuu.

Fanaa Hone Mein Ek Sukoon Sa Hai
Juda Hone Mein Ek Junoon Sa Hai
Do Dilon Ka Ishq Hi To Deta Firta Hai Gawaahi Warna Bataa
Khuda Hone Ka Saboot Kya Hai
Baraf Si Saaf Sufed Hai Tu
Ye Tujhpe Daag Lagaa Denge
Jahaan Jo Ban Baitha Dushman
Jahaan Ko Aag Lagaa Denge
Hum Itne Dhokhe Kha Baithe
Tabhi Na Tujhko Dagaa Denge
Deewanapan Bala Hai Kya
Deewane Karke Dikhadenge

Ban Jaa Tu Meri Ban Ja Ban,
Ban Ja Tu Meri Ban Ja Ban,
Reh Jaana Meri Tu Reh Jaa Ban,
Oh Tere Piche Jo Khudayi Chadhh Aaya Mere Maahi Kyun?

TuuтАж. Mahi TuтАж Chadd Ke Naaa
Tuu.... JaayiiiтАж Tuuu..
Mahi Tu.. Mahi Tuu. Mahi Tuuu. Mahi Tuu.

Tere Toh Sukoon Ae Tere Toh Junoon Ae
Bulliyan Te Hassa Tera
Ki Mai Karun Ve
Nindran Udariyan
Rooh Me V Tu Hai,
Nain Jo Milaiyan
Ki Mai Karun,
Ni Tu Dil Nu Na Teekhiyan Daga De
Meethe Bullan Naale Dede Tu Wafa Ve
Menu Teriyan V Khamiyan Ni Disdi
Jithe Vekha Bas Tu Disda

Ban Jaa Tu Meri Ban Ja Ban,
Ban Ja Tu Meri Ban Ja Ban,
Reh Jaana Meri Tu Reh Jaa Ban,
Oh Tere Piche Jo Khudayi Chadhh Aaya Mere Maahi Kyun?

TuuтАж. Mahi TuтАж Chadd Ke Naaa
Tuu.... JaayiiiтАж Tuuu..
Mahi Tu.. Mahi Tuu. Mahi Tuuu. Mahi Tuu.
